title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, retrieval, tool-calling, etc.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama—chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Lightweight CLI copilot that shells out to Ollama for inline code suggestions and explanations.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ingest PDFs and chat over them locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; synchronous & async APIs, model management, streaming.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Experimental Vim plugin that replaces GitHub Copilot backend with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Showcase repo for building autonomous agents that plan and act via Ollama chat completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that wraps the Ollama REST API for dependency-injected chat & embedding services.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-built Rust crate for chatting, pulling and managing Ollama models asynchronously.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with strongly-typed request/response models and streaming.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama completions into channels/DMs with thread memory and rate limits.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama chat & embeddings via REST with admin UI and API keys.

title: ollama-gpt-cli
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) client for Ollama inspired by chatgpt-cli, supports markdown and conversation history.

title: ollama-rag-redis
summary: Real-time RAG example using Redis vector search + Ollama embeddings and chat, deployable on Redis Cloud.
